case_title: HOWARD FISHMAN VS. HANK Y.NOGAWA TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-08-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-07-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-24-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHMAN, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT HANK Y.NOGAWA TRUST CHONG, FONG M. VALENCIA AUTO SERVICE DOES ONE THROUGH THRITY,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-24-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2006
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
